subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have revealed in the Book that which no scriptures of the past can equal, as doth bear witness He with Whom is the Mother Book. The Hidden One hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا انزلنا فی الکتاب ما لا تعادله کتب القبل یشهد بذلک من عنده ام الکتاب قد ظهر المکنون
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
